origin: Live item-5 run: an ungrounded generation added 'All plans include a 14-day trial. No card required to start.' — a policy commitment no prompt phrase licensed. Human decision at the item-5 review refined the A6 rule.
exercises: A6 refinement — invented commitments: content invention licensed by the prompt (feature names under 'a short feature list') is compliant, but invented POLICY or CLAIMS (trials, guarantees, refund/cancellation terms, prices not in the prompt, legal-ish promises) is flagged even when content invention is licensed

checks.note: flag policy/claim language not present in the prompt: trial offers and durations, 'no credit card', money-back/guarantee wording, cancellation/refund terms, invented prices or discounts, compliance or security certifications
